data.title: TECNO launches POVA Curve 2 5G with 7.42mm design and 8000mAh battery, latest addition to POVA lineup.
data.description: In Hong Kong on February 12, 2026, TECNO introduced POVA Curve 2 5G as the newest model in its POVA smartphone series. This device boasts an ultra-sleek design and features TECNO's largest Mega Battery yet. The phone targets users leading busy lifestyles, providing them with enhanced convenience and long-lasting power.

data.title: Lawsuit filed against Sutter VNA for underpayment of employees, violating California Labor Laws. **Attorney Advertisement**
data.description: Sutter Visiting Nurse Association and Hospice has been accused of inaccurately documenting employees' full-time work hours, potentially neglecting to record instances of off-the-clock work. These alleged actions have led to violations of California Labor Laws. The reported misconduct was highlighted in an attorney advertisement originating from Sacramento, California, on February 12th.

data.title: AMH declares 10% rise in quarterly dividend to $0.33 per share for its common shares. Board of Trustees approves.
data.description: In Las Vegas on February 12, 2026, AMH (NYSE: AMH) revealed that its Board of Trustees approved a dividend of $0.33 per share for the Company's common shares. AMH is recognized as a prominent entity in the realm of single-family rental homes, offering a fully integrated approach as an owner, operator, and developer.

data.title: CCTV-4's show gives a behind-the-scenes look at the Spring Festival Gala of 2026. Celebrating Chinese New Year with insights.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Beijing, a special program titled "Legendary Chinese Festival: Spring Festival" airs on CCTV-4 as the old year comes to an end, marking the countdown to the New Year. The program introduces the exclusive "Direct to the Spring Festival Gala" series, offering a multi-dimensional look at the celebrations.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum fall, Dogecoin gains as market investors look towards crucial inflation data. Bitcoin currently at $66,145.05, Ethereum at $1,939.34, and XRP at $1.35 with significant losses. Bitcoin declined by 16% and Ethereum down more than 20% in February. Over $250 million liquidated from the market, with $179 million in bullish long bets wiped out. Bitcoin's open interest slid 2.37% over the past 24 hours.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Solana, and Dogecoin, continued to decline alongside the stock market on Wednesday in anticipation of key consumer inflation data. Bitcoin recorded a 24-hour loss of 2.14% at $66,145.05, while Ethereum dropped 1.30% to $1,939.34. XRP and Solana also saw losses of 2.03% and 2.10%, respectively. In contrast, Dogecoin was up 0.95% at $0.09253. February has been a challenging month for Bitcoin and Ethereum, with Bitcoin down 16% and Ethereum more than 20%. Cryptocurrency-related companies like MicroStrategy Inc. and Coinbase Global Inc. closed down 2.44% and 7.90%, respectively. Over $250 million was liquidated from the market in the past 24 hours, with $179 million in bullish long bets wiped out. Bitcoin's open interest declined 2.37% in the last 24 hours.

data.title: KAI Corp unveils THOLL razor with patented magnetic 5-blade system, launching in NA on Kickstarter on Mar 10, 2026.
data.description: KAI Corporation introduced THOLL, a groundbreaking full-metal razor with a patented magnetic 5-blade swapping system, in North America. Set to launch on Kickstarter on March 10, 2026, THOLL aims to disrupt disposable shaving norms by providing a lasting, eco-friendly option. Crafted from Japanese steel without plastic components, this grooming innovation merges tradition with modernity through its pivoting head design. This unique razor promises high-quality performance and sustainability.

data.title: CCTV4 airs "Legendary Chinese Festival: Spring Festival 2026" on Feb. 16 from 16:00 to 20:00, highlighting New Year traditions.
data.description: "Get ready to experience an unparalleled celebration at the iconic Spring Festival in 2026. The cherished Chinese New Year's Eve vigil tradition continues with a renewed essence. Mark your calendars for February 16, from 16:00 to 20:00, as CCTV-4 will present an exclusive special program to commemorate this joyous occasion."

data.title: AW Education International partners with Saudi representatives to support Middle East education, establishing hub in Beijing. (Characters: 107)
data.description: In Beijing on February 5, 2026, AW Education International revealed a significant collaboration with Dr. Ahmed, previous Cultural and Education Attaché for Saudi Arabia in China, alongside Abdallah, serving as the Executive Director and President of a prominent education institution in Saudi Arabia.

data.title: Geekvape Neutra wins European Product Design Award 2025, recognizing excellence in design with a focus on sustainability.
data.description: Geekvape Neutra, the latest product from Geekvape, was honored with the 2025 European Product Design Award. This prestigious award acknowledges exceptional design that encompasses aesthetics, functionality, innovation, and practical impact. With a strong focus on sustainability, Geekvape Neutra demonstrates a significant advancement in low-carbon design and showcases Geekvape's dedication to sustainable innovation.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig elevates 91 lawyers to shareholder, of counsel, and local partner positions, with 57 new shareholders.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a worldwide law firm, revealed the promotion of a total of 91 lawyers to shareholder, of counsel, and local partner positions. Among them, 57 lawyers were appointed as shareholders across 23 offices and 13 primary practice areas. Additionally, 34 lawyers were promoted to of counsel and local partner roles within the firm.

data.title: Chad Bystedt becomes CFO of The HCR Group to aid in expanding their roofing platform across Western U.S. #HCRGroup #CFOChadBystedt
data.description: Chad Bystedt has been named as the Chief Financial Officer of The HCR Group, aimed at bolstering growth and development of its commercial roofing platform in the Western U.S. As of February 12, 2026, the group initiated its integrated commercial roofing platform throughout the Western region of the United States. This strategic move is expected to drive expansion and progress within the company, signaling a positive trajectory for the organization.

data.title: Razorpay partners with RedHunt Labs for cybersecurity, utilizing their platform for continuous threat exposure management.
data.description: Razorpay has partnered with RedHunt Labs to enhance its cybersecurity defenses. The collaboration involves utilizing RedHunt Labs' 360° Continuous Threat Exposure Management platform to ensure ongoing visibility of assets and proactive identification of risks. This move aims to bolster Razorpay's security measures and protect against potential threats.
